pr.title: Fix Quotex trade entry timing and risk filters
pr.body:
## Summary
- Removed hardcoded Quotex/Mistral credentials and moved runtime configuration to environment variables with `.env.example`.
- Fixed trade execution flow to wait for the configured candle window, send entries `ANTECIPAR_ENTRADA_SEGUNDOS` before close, require a complete order ID, and log the ID through result tracking.
- Added payout, daily stop win/loss, fixed/percentage/Soros-limited sizing, ATR/wick indecision filters, macro/micro Price Action context, and Mistral prompt context.
- Replaced the unavailable `pyquotex` PyPI dependency with the pinned GitHub source dependency and documented setup/run steps.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Test on DEMO with valid `.env` credentials and confirm an order is actually accepted with a complete ID shown in logs.
- [ ] Verify `ANTECIPAR_ENTRADA_SEGUNDOS=5` matches the broker/server timing in your environment; adjust if entries are still late or early.
- [ ] Confirm payout values from Quotex match expectations before using real money.
- [ ] Review `STOP_WIN_DIARIO`, `STOP_LOSS_DIARIO`, `VALOR_PADRAO`, and `MODO_ENTRADA` before running unattended.

### Notes
I could run static/smoke checks locally, but I did not execute live trades because that requires real Quotex credentials/session and financial-risk approval.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/3605201e8d8042ccaaa9d6bac2bd66c7
Requested by: @russocanalbr-ops
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
